Bubblemap — flow by strike × expiry

Where volume concentrates (size = today's volume, color = open interest). Packed on one strike = directional conviction; spread across strikes = often hedging/gamma. Pick a ticker ▾
Source: signal_archive EOD 2026-06-05 (today's run). Ranking = number of distinct screeners (then OOS-validated, then options flow, then strength). SMART_FLOW absent = it produced no signal today. Momentum/breakout screener scores (CLENOW, BREAKOUT) capped at 100 (they output an unbounded raw score).
